details.test: Task 1: Add two cheapest Spanish red wines under 25 with 4+ stars to cart
Task 2: Build a 6-bottle mixed wine pack with custom pack builder
Task 3: Save quick gin cocktail recipe to shopping list with liquid ingredients only
Task 4: Find nearest store within 5 miles that has a specific product in stock
Task 5: Subscribe to newsletter with whisky and rum interests only
Task 6: Choose a filtered wine and set standard shipping
Task 7: Add product with blue packaging and gift message then proceed to checkout
Task 8: Add two top-rated wines under 25 to wishlist
Task 9: Add spicy-food pairing wine under 30 and under 14 percent ABV to cart
